SEARCH
Package ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui

Class RenderItem

java.lang.Object
ca.sfu.cmpt276.team7.ui.RenderItem
public class RenderItem extends Object
A lightweight, immutable render command to be consumed by DrawQueue.

A RenderItem represents exactly one drawable element. The RenderKind determines which fields are meaningful:

  • RECTANGLE: uses x/y/width/height and color
  • TEXT: uses x/y, color, text, font
  • SPRITE: uses x/y/width/height, sheetId and src rect (srcX/srcY/srcW/srcH)
Items are sorted by layer before drawing (lower layers render first).
Version:
1.0
Author:
Yui Matsumoto

  • Method Details

    • rect

      public static RenderItem rect(int layer, int x, int y, int width, int height, Color color)
      Creates a rectangle render item.
      Parameters:
      layer - draw layer (lower drawn first)
      x - destination x (pixels)
      y - destination y (pixels)
      width - rectangle width (pixels)
      height - rectangle height (pixels)
      color - fill color
      Returns:
      a new rectangle RenderItem

    • text

      public static RenderItem text(int layer, int x, int y, Color color, String text, Font font)
      Creates a text render item. Width/height are not used for text.
      Parameters:
      layer - draw layer (lower drawn first)
      x - text anchor x (pixels)
      y - text baseline y (pixels)
      color - text color
      text - string to draw
      font - font used to draw the text
      Returns:
      a new text RenderItem

    • sprite

      public static RenderItem sprite(int layer, int x, int y, int width, int height, SheetId sheetId, int srcX, int srcY, int srcW, int srcH)
      Creates a sprite render item.
      Parameters:
      layer - draw layer (lower drawn first)
      x - destination x (pixels)
      y - destination y (pixels)
      width - destination width (pixels)
      height - destination height (pixels)
      sheetId - sprite sheet identifier
      srcX - source x in the sprite sheet (pixels)
      srcY - source y in the sprite sheet (pixels)
      srcW - source width in the sprite sheet (pixels)
      srcH - source height in the sprite sheet (pixels)
      Returns:
      a new sprite RenderItem

    • getLayer

      public int getLayer()
      Returns:
      the draw layer (lower layers are rendered first)

    • getKind

      public RenderKind getKind()
      Returns:
      the render kind (RECTANGLE, TEXT, or SPRITE)

    • getX

      public int getX()
      Returns:
      destination x in pixels

    • getY

      public int getY()
      Returns:
      destination y in pixels

    • getWidth

      public int getWidth()
      Returns:
      destination width in pixels (unused for TEXT)

    • getHeight

      public int getHeight()
      Returns:
      destination height in pixels (unused for TEXT)

    • getColor

      public Color getColor()
      Returns:
      color for RECTANGLE/TEXT, or null for SPRITE

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Returns:
      text content (empty string for non-TEXT)

    • getFont

      public Font getFont()
      Returns:
      font for TEXT, or null otherwise

    • getSheetId

      public SheetId getSheetId()
      Returns:
      sprite sheet id for SPRITE, or SheetId.NONE otherwise

    • getSrcX

      public int getSrcX()
      Returns:
      source x in the sprite sheet (SPRITE only)

    • getSrcY

      public int getSrcY()
      Returns:
      source y in the sprite sheet (SPRITE only)

    • getSrcW

      public int getSrcW()
      Returns:
      source width in the sprite sheet (SPRITE only)

    • getSrcH

      public int getSrcH()
      Returns:
      source height in the sprite sheet (SPRITE only)
